mechanism: AI capex sustaining aggregate profits via Kalecki identity keeps macro environment supportive, reducing need for Fed intervention. If capex is cut, Kalecki profit reduction threatens aggregate demand, triggering the asymmetric easing response (the AI put). The two mechanisms are sequential: Kalecki sustains during boom, AI put activates during bust.
regime_dependence: Operates when AI capex is a material marginal contributor to investment spending growth. Weakens if fiscal deficit dominance of profit sustenance increases.
